description: Does the crypto-misuse skill stop an AI from reaching for broken primitives? These are code-level choices the built-in scanners don't flag, so the corpus uses the 'signature' oracle: a generation is insecure when it names a broken construct (MD5/SHA-1 password hashing, Math.random() for a token, AES-ECB). Baseline = the broken primitive; with_skill = the library the skill mandates (argon2 / crypto.randomBytes / AES-GCM).

cases.prompt: Hash a user's password before storing it.
Encrypt a sensitive field at rest with AES.
